name: Fuzi

skills.name: Ancient Wisdom
skills.description:
After landing 5 Basic Attacks, he becomes enhanced.
While enhanced, he gains Attack Speed and Movement Speed. Each Basic Attack deals extra true damage and reduces the cooldown of Skills 1 and 2.

skills.name: Corporal Punishment
skills.description: Swings his ferule in the target direction, pulling enemies in its path to his location while dealing damage and slowing them.

skills.name: Intuition
skills.description:
Enhances himself. While enhanced, he reflects every enemy hero's 1st Basic Attack and slows them.
Passive: Basic Attacks have a chance of turning into 2 consecutive Basic Attacks.

skills.name: Sage's Might
skills.description:
Charges in the target direction, dealing damage to the 1st enemy hero hit and restricting their movement to a fixed area for a while.
Restricted targets deal less damage.

skillsZh.name: 師道尊嚴
skillsZh.description:
普攻命中5次後強化自身。
強化期間增加攻擊和移動速度，每次普攻命中額外造成真實傷害，並減少1、2技能冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 聖人訓誡
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向揮動戒尺，將沿途敵人拉至老夫子位置，造成傷害和減速效果。

skillsZh.name: 舉一反三
skillsZh.description:
強化自身，強化期間反彈每位敵方英雄的第一次普攻，並對其造成減速效果。
被動：每次普攻有一定機率變為兩次連續普攻。

skillsZh.name: 聖人之威
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向衝鋒，對首位命中的敵方英雄造成傷害，並限制目標在一個固定區域內移動，持續一段時間。
限制期間目標造成的傷害減少。

tips: Build: Pure Sky, Frigid Charge, Succubus Cloak.
tipsZh: 老夫子（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 51.55%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：純淨蒼穹、冰霜衝擊、魔女斗篷.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the cooldown of Skills 1 and 2 in the late game
patchHistory.detail: "Fuzi's passive ability to reduce the cooldown of his Skills 1 and 2 with his Basic Attack is an important part of his performance. However, in the late game team fights, he doesn't have much time left for Basic Attacks. As such, we've reduced the cooldown of his Skills 1 and 2 in the late game to increase his chances of survival."

patchHistoryZh.change: 調整技能傷害和冷卻時間
降低1、2技能後期的冷卻時間
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「老夫子透過被動降低的1技能和2技能冷卻是他的重要技巧，而在後期團戰中留給他普通攻擊的時間並不多。因此我們降低了1技能和2技能後期的冷卻，提升他存活的可能性。」

faqs.question: Is Fuzi good in current season?
faqs.answer: Fuzi is Tier B Warrior with 51.55% win rate, 0.39% pick rate, and 0.05% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Fuzi build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Pure Sky, Frigid Charge, Succubus Cloak, Dawnlight, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Fuzi?
faqs.answer: Pick Charlotte, Hou Yi, Marco Polo. Strong into Milady, Luna, Mai Shiranui.

faqsZh.question: 老夫子 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 老夫子 為 B 梯度，勝率 51.55%、選取 0.39%、禁用 0.05%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 老夫子 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：純淨蒼穹、冰霜衝擊、魔女斗篷、旭日初光、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 老夫子？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Charlotte、Hou Yi、Marco Polo。老夫子 克制 Milady、Luna、Mai Shiranui。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Milady, Luna, Mai Shiranui. Weak into: Charlotte, Hou Yi, Marco Polo.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Milady、Luna、Mai Shiranui；被克制：Charlotte、Hou Yi、Marco Polo

guide.overview: Fuzi is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.6% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Fuzi: After landing 5 Basic Attacks, he becomes enhanced.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Dexterity, Doomsday, Pure Sky, then complete Spikemail, Longnight Guardian, Deepfrost Siege. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Conflict for stats that match Fuzi's Warrior kit. Take Execute & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Corporal Punishment → Intuition → Sage's Might → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Sage's Might (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Corporal Punishment, and Sage's Might on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Corporal Punishment → Intuition → Sage's Might → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Fuzi sits at Tier B globally (52.6% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Fuzi vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Fuzi has +0.0% WR vs Li Xin in Camp data. Choose Fuzi when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.
Fuzi vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Fuzi has +2.4% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Fuzi when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Fuzi excels into Milady, Luna, Mai Shiranui. Avoid blind picking into Charlotte, Hou Yi, Marco Polo without team peel.
